headline: Trump 🍊🔨 SMASHES State AI Nanny Rules 👶🚫‼️
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊👨‍💼 dropping that EXECUTIVE BOMB 💣📜 in the Oval Office 🏛️😤, signing order to YEET 🚀💥 all those pesky STATE AI REG RULES 🛑🤖 from Cali snowflakes ❄️🌴 to redneck robot rodeos 🤠🤖! 'ONE CENTRAL DADDY APPROVAL 👑✅,' Trump ROARS at reporters 📸🗣️ like he's capping the deep state swamp 🐊🚽! White House AI simp David Sacks 💼🤖 spilling tea ☕: tools to PUNCH BACK 👊 on 'ONEROUS' state BS 🚫, but kids' safety? COOL BEANS 🆗👶 – no clowning there 🤡🚫!

BIG TECH DADDIES 🤑💰 like OpenAI SAM ALTMAN 🤖🍆, Google Pichai 🧔🔍, META ZUCK 🤖😎, Anthropic 👽 aliens WINNING HARD 🏆🔥 – no more PATCHWORK NIGHTMARE 🧵😩 slowing their BILLIONS 🚀💸 AI ORGY 💦👯‍♂️! States been wildin' 😜 with 1,000+ BILLS 📜💥, 38 states this year alone dropping 100 AI LAWS 📊🚨 – Cali forcing CHATBOT 'HEY I'M A ROBOT 🤖🔔' reminders for zoomer kids 📱👶, plus CATACLYSMIC RISK PLANS 📈💀 for big boys! North Dakota yeeting AI STALKER BOTS 🚫🤖🕵️‍♂️, Arkansas NO-IP THIEF AI 🎨🚫, Oregon BARS fake nurse bots 🏥🤖❌ – total CHAOS 🌀🤪!

Gavin Newsom 🌴😡, Dem crybaby GRIFTER 👶💰, RAGING 🍆💥: 'Trump's TECH BRO BLOWJOB 👅🤑 preempting our AI SAFEGUARDS 🛡️ – enriching his cronies! 😤🇺🇸' Mothers Against Media Addiction moms 👩‍👧🚫 whining 'STATES NEED GUARDRAILS 🛣️🛡️!' But NetChoice lobby simps 🤤📱 PRAISING: 'NATL RULEBOOK 📚✅ for INNOVATORS 🚀 – let's cook with White House! 👨‍🍳🏛️'

NY Law prof Michael Goodyear 🎓⚖️ dropping truth bombs 💣: 'PATCHWORK = PAIN 😩🧩, GIMME ONE FED LAW 📜👑... but HOPE it's not TRUMPED-UP GARBAGE 😂🍊!' Tech giants vs China RACE 🏎️🇨🇳? NO STATE DRAG RACE 🚗😴 – Trump's making USA AI DADDY 👑🤖, leaving blue states SALTY AF 🧂😭 like Newsom's hair gel meltdown 💇‍♂️💦! Innovation BRRRR 🚀📈, no more 50-state circus 🤹‍♂️🎪 – TRUMP 202X AI SUPREMACY 🥇🔥‼️
